title: Oka's Better Desert
description: Oka's Better Desert is a vanilla friendly mod that improves the Desert biome.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e943c24686f0790e32d4a4ec8cca0f3a842f249.png)


**Oka's Better Desert is a vanilla friendly mod that improves the Desert Biome by adding new blocks, items and structures.**

- You can craft up to 8 new sandstone variants and 5 red sandstone variants.


![Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0724abaaa85dacff2e29ee12b8b7681fd4510b40.png)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Terracotta Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88cfcee5b02ab0242657e4f10609d9c03b1de499.png)

</details>
  
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
![Sandstone Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08b7b735bd38b09246ce112b88c11d59ec1c6702.png)

![Red Sandstone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6bde502399467ba40d76271efec15be40d5c60f.png)

</details>

- You can find some new cactus, used to have dried cactus food and cactus soup.

- You can craft a new wood type from the cactus, since there's no trees in the desert.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Cactus Wood Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1b92d699ba779dabec89e2edec3a02614aae265.png)

</details>

- You can also craft 2 new wool variant, the Royal Wool with 8 wools and a string and the Tiled Wool with 4 wools and a string.




![Wools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a1cf7ece61523ef62b87bc7c5f1dac5dc24a9e3.png)



You can find an oasis in the desert biome.


![Oasis](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/516d4657911e9fa956485b0d9869c63d6f532418.png)




In this mod, you can discover a new huge dungeon in the desert.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Sarcophage Room](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0903bc5c9579b53f1adad159c8f3cadadfa24f6.png)

![Pot Room](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f33e852c9b55656f6f11933535d3a35c7f2accd5.png)

![Book Room](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08b0bc9a1f81efe92ed61bced3d3336048846223.png)

![The Spider Corridor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e55b3ab2b8c2e14d5bf728634a684abbaade0470.png)

![A random room](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47a923aec081b68725ff002a0fc4770f6d1b84c7.png)

</details>



**This is the first version of the mod, some updates may come in the future. Always feel free to give me feedback, it helps a lot ! ;P**
